MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ariella Kupetz, Esq. 213-402-9564 Fisher & Phillips LLP for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

ARGUED. Ms. Kupetz informs the court when the proof of service was served and filed and discusses amended motion. The Court does not have a copy of the amended motion; motion is denied without prejudice and party may refile. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT STACHS LLC, EAZE TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed Motion to be Relieved as Counsel by Hannah Sweiss, Ariella M. Kupetz and Fisher & Phillips, counsel for Defendants Stachs LLC and Eaze Technologies, Inc. is DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.

Moving Parties failed to file and serve the notice of motion and motion as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005, subdivisions (b).

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
